AFM avatar-face-mvp
What This ProvesFeature Status
GitHub
Godot 4 prototype

VRM avatar lipsync real-time, zero-latency.

Mic in → face moves convincingly at 60 fps with FFT visemes. Webcam in → full face tracking with 52 ARKit blendshapes. Type text → avatar speaks with lip-synced TTS.

See capabilities Read the Handbook

Mic input

FFT visemes @ 60fps zero-latency lipsync

Webcam

OpenSeeFace tracking with 52 blendshapes

TTS

Type text → KokoroSharp speaks with visemes

What This Proves

Core capabilities in working prototype form.

Mic → Face

Real-time FFT viseme lipsync at 60 fps with zero-latency mouth movement.

Webcam → Tracking

Full facial capture with 52 ARKit blendshapes via OpenSeeFace.

Text → Speech

Type text and hear avatar speak with perfectly synced lips.

CC0 VRM Support

Download any CC0 VRM model—auto-detected mapping profiles handle the rest.

Data-Driven

Swap mapping JSON, not code. Expressions, blinks, and idle animations all configurable.

Composition Engine

Blend blinks > gaze > visemes > emotions with procedural breathing and head drift.

Feature Status

Core Lipsync

FFT viseme lipsync ✓
OpenSeeFace tracking ✓
TTS bridge + KokoroSharp ✓

Animation

Procedural blink ✓
Idle animation (breathing, sway) ✓
Eye gaze + micro-saccades ✓

Expression System

Expression compositor ✓
Blink > gaze > visemes stacking ✓
Emotion from TTS cues ✓

Integration

BridgeManager auto-connect ✓
Data-driven profiles ✓
CC0 VRM loader ✓
